observed_weaknesses: Manual Default implementation for ScanOptions triggered clippy::derivable_impls.
JSONL line reading used filter_map(Result::ok), triggering clippy::lines_filter_map_ok.
One JSON value extraction branch manually implemented Option::map.
Two sentence splitting helpers used manual char comparisons.

selected_candidate.name: clippy-clean Rust lint gate
selected_candidate.reason: Make the Rust library pass strict clippy so future AutoResearch iterations can use it as a quality gate.

safety_controls: No parser semantics were intentionally changed.
The fix was limited to idiomatic equivalents requested by clippy.
cargo test was rerun after clippy passed.
